blockingIssues.description: The Worker now stops when heartbeat acknowledgements return `shouldStop: true`, but the new pre-step cancellation path emits a `cancel` milestone at `stepIndex: 0`, colliding with the existing `start` milestone at the same index. Because Convex de-duplicates milestones by `(runId, stepIndex)`, the terminal cancellation milestone is dropped instead of being persisted end-to-end.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the Convex workpool test-harness pattern: register the pool on the `convexTest` instance and drain scheduled functions to exercise enqueueAction-backed work end-to-end.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow a test-only validation exception to the mandatory RED-first workflow when the assigned feature is purely missing regression coverage for already-correct behavior and no production code change is expected.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-wave-dispatch-integration-test` review passed, but the worker still had to mark `followedProcedure: false` because `.factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md` requires a RED cycle even for coverage-only assignments whose new tests can pass immediately against existing behavior.
